scripts.pack:dev: pnpm run build && pnpm run stage && tsx scripts/build-app.ts --dir
scripts.make: pnpm run build && pnpm run stage && tsx scripts/build-app.ts
scripts.make:mac: pnpm run build && pnpm run stage -- --platform darwin && tsx scripts/build-app.ts --mac
scripts.make:mac:x64: pnpm run build && pnpm run stage -- --platform darwin --arch x64 && tsx scripts/build-app.ts --mac --x64
scripts.make:mac:arm64: pnpm run build && pnpm run stage -- --platform darwin --arch arm64 && tsx scripts/build-app.ts --mac --arm64
scripts.make:win: pnpm run build && pnpm run stage -- --platform win32 && tsx scripts/build-app.ts --win
scripts.make:win:x64: pnpm run build && pnpm run stage -- --platform win32 --arch x64 && tsx scripts/build-app.ts --win --x64
scripts.make:win:arm64: pnpm run build && pnpm run stage -- --platform win32 --arch arm64 && tsx scripts/build-app.ts --win --arm64
scripts.make:linux: pnpm run build && pnpm run stage -- --platform linux && tsx scripts/build-app.ts --linux
scripts.make:linux:x64: pnpm run build && pnpm run stage -- --platform linux --arch x64 && tsx scripts/build-app.ts --linux --x64
scripts.make:linux:arm64: pnpm run build && pnpm run stage -- --platform linux --arch arm64 && tsx scripts/build-app.ts --linux --arm64
